title: VQE Applications for Chemistry and Materials
description: Apply the Variational Quantum Eigensolver to real-world chemistry and materials science problems, including molecular Hamiltonians, ansatz selection strategies, active space methods, and benchmark molecules.
learningObjectives: Construct molecular Hamiltonians in second quantization and map them to qubit operators
Select appropriate ansatz structures for different molecular systems
Apply active space selection to reduce computational requirements
Implement VQE for benchmark molecules including H2, LiH, and H2O
Analyze VQE results and compare with classical chemistry methods
